hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]

layout.spacing_system: Generous paddings (p-8 to p-24) to give elements breathing room.

grid_patterns.bento_steam: Asymmetric Bento Grid for 5 disciplines. Science spans 2 columns, others 1 column.
grid_patterns.process_flow: Zigzag alternating layout for the 6-step scientific method to keep scrolling engaging.

component_styling.cards_tactile: bg-white border-2 border-[#0F172A] rounded-2xl shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
component_styling.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold rounded-full border-2 border-[#0F172A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all duration-200
component_styling.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-white text-[#0F172A] px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold rounded-full border-2 border-[#0F172A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all duration-200
component_styling.tags: px-4 py-1.5 bg-[#E0E7FF] text-[#4338CA] rounded-full text-sm font-bold border border-[#4338CA]

motion.global_scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended for premium feel.
motion.animations: Use framer-motion. Spring physics (stiffness: 300, damping: 20) for interactive elements. Stagger children (staggerChildren: 0.1) for lists/cards.
motion.hover_effects: Cards pop up and shadows deepen. Buttons scale up slightly.

accessibility.contrast: All text meets APCA/WCAG AA contrast due to the strict dark text and dark borders over light backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include descriptive 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

hero_image.description: Two young girls exploring chemistry in a lab. Used in Hero to establish target demographic and action.

educator_portrait.description: Smiling female scientist in lab coat. Used in 'About the Educator' section.

robotics_tech.description: Child assembling robotics. Use in Programmes or Technology cards.

krakow_location.description: Bustling street scene in Krakow. Use as a background or side image in the Summer Camp Events section.

sections_requirements.header: Sticky nav with solid white background, 2px bottom border. Include Logo text, links, and 'Enquire Now' CTA button.
sections_requirements.hero: Split layout. Left: Massive H1, lively paragraph, Primary CTA. Right: Hero image inside a stylized card with tactile shadow, floating decorative icons (atom, rocket) around it.
sections_requirements.about_educator: Use Educator Portrait. Highlight 'PhD Cognitive Scientist' & 'Neuroscience Coach' using tags. Layout: Image on left, narrative on right.
sections_requirements.what_is_steam: Bento Grid of 5 cards (S, T, E, A, M). Each gets a unique accent color background (e.g., S=Indigo, T=Mint, E=Orange, A=Purple, M=Yellow) but with dark text and borders to unify them. Clickable/movable feel.
sections_requirements.why_steam: Grid of 6 standard tactile cards (3 columns). Icons from @phosphor-icons/react (duotone).
sections_requirements.investigative_approach: 6-step scientific method. Visual flow diagram. Use a vertical zigzag path with a dashed SVG line connecting numbered circles.
sections_requirements.programmes: 3 large tactile cards detailing the programs. Rich descriptions, use the robotics image for one.
sections_requirements.upcoming_events: Summer Camp 2026 Krakow. Timeline/Calendar view for Mon-Fri daily themes. Use the Krakow image as a stylized map or side visual.
sections_requirements.register_form: Shadcn UI form wrapped in a tactile card container. Thick borders on inputs, strong focus rings.
sections_requirements.faq: Shadcn accordion styled with borders between items, plus (+) icon that rotates to minus (x) on open.
sections_requirements.footer: Dark background (#0F172A) with white text. Space for FB/IG links. Clean layout.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required libraries: framer-motion, lucide-react, @phosphor-icons/react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Use ONLY raw HTML/Tailwind for the layout wrappers to achieve the neo-brutalist 'tactile card' look. Do NOT use Shadcn Card component as it is too subtle/corporate.
Use Shadcn UI ONLY for complex logic elements (Accordion for FAQ, Form/Input for Registration). Even then, override their styles to match the thick borders and solid shadows.
Implement 'Outfit' for headers and 'DM Sans' for body using standard web font imports.
Ensure all buttons and form elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do not use generic placeholders. Use the provided image URLs.
Create .js or .jsx files instead of .tsx files as per environment constraints.
